source.title: Double dissociation of basolateral and central amygdala lesions on the general and outcome-specific forms of pavlovian-instrumental transfer

confidence_rationale: Provides the causal anatomical substrate for cue-matched-trace -> instrumental invigoration and a clean double dissociation of outcome-specific (BLA) vs general (CeA) cue-driven vigor, replicated one synapse downstream by Corbit & Balleine 2011 (NAc shell vs core) including reversible inactivation at test. Directly validates separating goal_match (specific) from a general wanting/arousal gain in ghost_priority. Held below 0.85 because the biology insists these are dissociable channels, not one multiplicative product.
failure_signatures: CeA/NAc-core-type failure: cues generally invigorate ANY available action regardless of whether it earns the cue's predicted goal -- nonspecific arousal-driven over-pursuit.
BLA/NAc-shell-type failure: loss of the cue->specific-goal mapping, so a matched cue no longer preferentially re-probes its own deferred goal while generic drive persists.
Because expression depends on these structures at test (2011 muscimol), a well-encoded cue can fail to invigorate if the retrieval-time channel is offline -- 'stored but un-actionable' bank entries.

mapping.source_claim_statement: Pavlovian-instrumental transfer has two dissociable forms: outcome-specific PIT (a cue selectively invigorates the action earning that cue's predicted outcome) requires basolateral amygdala (and, downstream, NAc shell); general PIT (a cue nonspecifically energises any instrumental action) requires central amygdala (and NAc core). Reversible inactivation at test reproduces the lesion pattern, so the structures are required at retrieval/expression.
mapping.ree_translation: Maps almost directly onto the ghost_priority score: a BLA/NAc-shell channel computes 'this cue matches this stored goal, re-probe THAT goal' (goal_match, MECH-292; the targeted probe of MECH-293) and a CeA/NAc-core channel computes a value-general arousal/vigor gain. ARC-060's discrete addressable bank is the structure the specific channel indexes into.
mapping.mapping_caveat: The biology insists the specific-match and general-wanting terms are anatomically and computationally SEPARABLE channels with independent failure modes; a single 'wanting x goal_match' product collapses two dissociable systems and cannot represent their independent failure (intact matching with absent vigor, or nonspecific over-invigoration with intact matching).
mapping.source_context: Rats; excitotoxic amygdala lesions (2005) and reversible muscimol inactivation of NAc subregions (2011); appetitive Pavlovian + instrumental training; PIT test in extinction.

confidence_components.notes: Source quality high (double dissociation replicated across two anatomical levels with reversible inactivation; pairs 2005 PMID 15673677 with 2011 PMID 21849539, DOI 10.1523/JNEUROSCI.2711-11.2011, PMC3208020). Mapping fidelity high: PIT is operationally exactly the bank operation (a cue invigorating a separately-stored action). Transfer risk moderate (rodent -> artificial bank).
